title: Black 8X10 Inch wooden Photo Frame Set of 4 with Mount for 6X8, Boxed Gallery Picture Frames 10X8'' 4Pack,6X8 inch Oxford Modern Thin Picture Frame With Glass Window for Tabletop or Wallmounted
features: 【High Quality and Durable Material】- 8X10 Inch Black photo frame is made of high quality MDF and clear glass. light weight, sturdy frame and high clarity. This 8X10 Inch wooden photo frame is perfect for displaying paintings, photos, postcards, scrapbooks and more!

【Boxed Gallery Photo Frames】- 8X10 inch boxed gallery black photo frame simple and elegant, 8X10 inch (20x25.5 cm) black photo frame includes 4 packages with Acid Free Mount, fit 8X10 inch/6X8 inch photos

【8X10 Inch Frame Decorative Effect】8X10 Inch black frame comes with hooks, which can be hung vertically or horizontally on the wall and become a beautiful landscape, this black 6x8 Inch photo frame is the best choice for wall decorations in living room, bedroom, dining room, bathroom, bar, hotel, office and so on.

【 Styling of the Photo Frame】- This high quality and stylish Black 8X10 Inch photo frame features a unique Black profile, and a premium acrylic window. Moreover, this modern design 8X10 Inch photo frame is understatedly stylish and elegantly simple, a wooden photo frame that many enthusiasts aspire to!

【Awesome Gift Ideas】- Our 8X10 Inch Black photo frame comes in a gift box with a beautiful framed gift, which is the best and perfect gift for graduation, Christmas, birthdays, baby christenings, weddings, anniversaries, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, Father's Day and other holidays. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
